mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM test_data_transfer_relation WHERE (data_id = #{transferRelation.dataId} AND data_relation_id = #{transferRelation.dataRelationId}) OR (data_id = #{transferRelation.dataRelationId} AND data_relation_id = #{transferRelation.dataId})

SELECT relation.data_relation_id FROM test_data_transfer_relation relation WHERE relation.data_id = #{dataId} UNION SELECT relation.data_id FROM test_data_transfer_relation relation WHERE relation.data_relation_id = #{dataId}
